text: Here, amidst these unfamiliar yet orderly corridors, I feel the sterility and anticipation of a space awaiting purpose. The quiet echoes with possibility—its emptiness draws my mind inward, searching for meaning in the design and geometry of my surroundings. Moving on, I'm drawn into the bold vibrancy of the R+D wall. The merging of human curiosity with technological progress is palpable. There's an energy here—a thrilling sense of innovation and inquiry. I feel challenged and invigorated, considering my small place within the broader sweep of discovery.
